name: RIWI Corp.
summary: RIWI Corp. operates as a trend-tracking and prediction technology firm in the United States, Canada, Europe, and internationally. Its patented cloud-based and machine-learning software solution provides global digital intelligence platform to clients seeking real-time citizen sentiment data. The company offers real-time applied analytics, forecasts, advance warnings, digital surveys, ad tests, trend-identification, predictive analytics, risk monitoring, and message testing services. RIWI Corporation was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
